candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A 0.4 mol sample of an ideal diatomic gas undergoes slow changes from state a to state b to state c and back to a along the cycle shown in the P-V diagram below: Path ab is an isotherm, and it can be shown that the work done by the gas as it changes isothermally from state a to state b is given by the equation $W_{ab} = -nRT \times \ln \left( \frac{V_b}{V_a} \right)$. How much work, $W_{ab}$, is done by the gas during step ab?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 一个理想双原子气体的 0.4 mol 样品经历了从状态 A 到状态 B 到状态 C 的缓慢变化,然后沿 P-V 图中显示的循环返回 A。路径 AB 是一个等温线,可以证明在从状态 A 到状态 B 过程中,气体所做的功由公式 $w_{ab} = -nRT\ln\left(\frac{V_b}{V_a}\right)$ 给出。请计算在步骤 AB 期间气体所做的功 $W_{AB}$ 的数值。
metadata.explanation_zh:
利用理想气体在等温膨胀或压缩过程中所做功的公式 $W = -nRT \ln \left( \frac{V_b}{V_a} \right)$,其中 $n$ 为气体物质的量(单位:mol),$R$ 为普适气体常数,$T$ 为绝对温度,$V_a$ 为初始体积,$V_b$ 为终止体积,我们可以计算所做功如下:

$W_{ab} = -nRT \cdot \ln \left( \frac{V_b}{V_a} \right) = - (0.4\, \text{mol}) \times (8.31\, \text{J/mol} \cdot \text{K}) \times (870\, \text{K}) \times \ln \left( \frac{48 \times 10^{-3}\, \text{m}^3}{12 \times 10^{-3}\, \text{m}^3} \right) = -4,000\, \text{J}$

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The problem is semantically clear: it asks for the work during the isothermal segment ab, and the P-V diagram is readable enough to identify the needed state values and volume ratio. The image is required and usable. There is a minor metadata risk because the raw answer includes a negative sign while the normalized answer does not.
